seo.title: What’s the Point of Wealth If You’re Unhealthy?
seo.description: In this special HEALTH edition of This or That, Bhartendra Singh sits down with Chirag Barjatya (Founder, Progressive Fitness Club – PFC) to cut through

takeaways: Fitness is not about aesthetics. Chirag Barjatya frames it as strength, endurance, and real health markers like lipids, LFT/KFT, and fasting glucose.
India gives you an edge here: full-body blood work costs roughly ₹1,600 to 1,800, so tracking your health markers is genuinely affordable.
Protein and carbs are not the villains. The episode covers veg and non-veg protein sources, safe whey use, creatine basics, and why rice or wheat portions matter more than cutting carbs out.
If you are 40-plus or a beginner, the path is step by step: walk first, then lift, then run, rather than chasing hacks.
Accountability beats information. Even in the age of AI, a coach helps because consistency, not the next trick, is what actually sticks.
